question: Which `make` target is described as: "Run the local CI verification suite"? Reply with only the target name.
context: ci: Run the local CI verification suite
agents-db: Run the local .agents backlog tool (example: make agents-db AGENTS_ARGS="rank --kind todos")
bib-check: Run strict source-backed bibliography verification
test: Run the Python test suite (for parallel runs: make test PYTEST_ARGS="-n auto")
lint-check: Run non-mutating Ruff format and lint checks
litkg-pipeline: Run the full litgraph-rs literature pipeline and optional graph rebuild
typst-lint: Run non-mutating Typst formatting checks

litkg-materialize: Materialize graphify-ready literature docs via litgraph-rs
litkg-sync: Merge manifest + BibTeX into the litgraph-rs registry
litkg-pipeline: Run the full litgraph-rs literature pipeline and optional graph rebuild

question: What command is shown for: "Optional: build CUDA RoPE2D acceleration for ViSTA-SLAM"? Reply with only the command line.
context:
# Optional: build CUDA RoPE2D acceleration for ViSTA-SLAM
pushd external/vista-slam/vista_slam/sta_model/pos_embed/curope

# ViSTA-SLAM loop closure dependency (DBoW3 Python bindings)
pushd external/vista-slam/DBoW3Py

# If you did not clone recursively:
git submodule update --init --recursive

# ViSTA pretrained files expected by the upstream backend
mkdir -p external/vista-slam/pretrains

# add `--extra streaming` to enable Record3D USB and Wi-Fi Preview support
uv run streamlit run streamlit_app.py
